mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_wishlist WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wishlist WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND product_id = #{productId}

SELECT p.product_id as productId , p.product_name as productName , p.brand_name as brandName , p.price , p.original_price as originalPrice , p.discount_rate as discountRate , p.product_url as productUrl , ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 2) as avgRating , COUNT(r.review_id) as reviewCount FROM t_wishlist w JOIN t_product p ON w.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN t_review r ON p.product_id = r.product_id WHERE w.member_id = #{memberId} GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.brand_name, p.price, p.original_price, p.discount_rate, p.product_url, w.reg_date ORDER BY w.reg_date DESC
